metadata.title: Momomusume - Authentic Taiwanese Cuisine & Food Truck in Fukushima
metadata.description: Fukushima Momomusume online store. Order authentic Taiwanese frozen foods and original goods. Food truck sales also available.

home.title: Authentic Taiwanese Cuisine & Frozen Delivery | Food Truck Sales
home.description: Official online shop of Fukushima Momomusume. Order authentic Taiwanese frozen foods such as Lu Rou Fan and original goods with nationwide delivery. Food truck and Taiwan night market event info also available.

shop.title: Taiwanese Food Online Shop & Frozen Delivery
shop.description: Order authentic Taiwanese frozen foods like Lu Rou Fan (braised pork rice) and original goods online with nationwide delivery. Enjoy authentic Taiwanese flavors at home with Momomusume.

taiwanNightMarket.title: Taiwan Night Market Fukushima | Night Market Food Delivery
taiwanNightMarket.description: Order famous Taiwan night market street foods like Shilin, Raohe and Ningxia. Authentic Taiwanese dishes including Da Ji Pai, Lu Rou Fan and Xiao Long Bao delivered nationwide by Momomusume.

news.title: News & Announcements
news.description: Latest news and announcements from Fukushima Momomusume. Taiwan night market event schedules, new frozen food products, media coverage and more.

shop.shippingFeeInfo: • Shipping fee: 840-880 yen (varies by region, tax incl.)
shop.shippingDeliveryInfo: • Delivery time: 3-5 days from order at the earliest (varies by region). You may also specify a preferred delivery date and time.

legal.tokushohoDescription: Notation based on the Specified Commercial Transaction Act for Fukushima Momomusume operated by Sakura Sisters Co., Ltd. Includes business name, address, contact, sales price, shipping fee, payment method, delivery timing, returns and other transaction terms.
legal.privacyDescription: Privacy policy of Fukushima Momomusume. Defines the collection, purpose of use, third-party provision, handling of cookies, and management of customers' personal information.
legal.addressValue: 361 Hara, Iitoi, Iitate-mura, Soma-gun, Fukushima 960-1721, Japan
legal.priceValue: As listed on each product page (tax incl.)
legal.shippingFeeValue: Varies by delivery region (840-880 yen, tax incl.). The amount is shown at checkout.
legal.paymentValue: Credit card (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, JCB)
legal.paymentTimingValue: Online payment at the time of order
legal.deliveryTimingValue: Shipped within 3 business days after payment confirmation
legal.returnsValue: Due to the nature of the products, we cannot accept returns or exchanges for customer convenience. If a product is defective or damaged, please contact us within 7 days of arrival.
legal.privacyCollectionText: On this site, we collect personal information such as your name, email address, phone number, and address when you place an order.
legal.privacyPurposeTitle: Purpose of Use of Personal Information
legal.privacyPurposeText:
We use the personal information we receive only for the following purposes.
・Shipping ordered products and providing delivery status updates
・Responding to inquiries regarding orders
・Analysis for service improvement
legal.privacyThirdPartyTitle: Provision of Personal Information to Third Parties
legal.privacyThirdPartyText: Except as required by law, we will not provide your personal information to third parties. However, we may provide information to delivery companies to the extent necessary for shipping products.
legal.privacyCookieText: This site may use cookies and access analysis tools to improve our services. This information does not identify individuals.
legal.privacyManagementText: We protect the personal information we receive with appropriate security measures. If you wish to disclose, correct, or delete your personal information, please contact us at the address below.
legal.privacyContactText: For inquiries regarding the handling of personal information, please contact us at the following.
legal.privacyContactBusiness: Business Name: Sakura Sisters Co., Ltd.
legal.contactIntro: For questions or order inquiries, please contact us by email below.

footer.tagline: Delivering delicious Lu Rou Fan and cute goods

taiwanNightMarket.heroTitle: Welcome to the Taiwan Night Market
taiwanNightMarket.heroSubtitle:
The world of Taiwan night markets
brought to you by Momomusume
taiwanNightMarket.guideSubtitle: Discover the charm of Taiwan night markets at home and abroad
taiwanNightMarket.noEvents: No information available at the moment
taiwanNightMarket.shilinDesc: Taipei's largest night market. A classic spot with everything from street food and fashion to games.
taiwanNightMarket.raoheDesc: A simple single-street layout. The pepper bun line is a must-see. Its nostalgic atmosphere is its charm.
taiwanNightMarket.ningxiaDesc: Specialized in gourmet food, so much it's called the "stomach's night market." Packed with delicious stalls loved by locals.
taiwanNightMarket.dajipaiDesc: A giant fried chicken as big as your face. The crispy coating and spicy five-spice aroma whet your appetite.
taiwanNightMarket.xiaolongbaoDesc: Thin skin filled with piping-hot broth. You can enjoy authentic flavors even at night market stalls.
taiwanNightMarket.stinkyTofuDesc: Known for its distinctive smell, but addictively delicious once you try it. The fried version is recommended for beginners.
taiwanNightMarket.footerTagline: Delivering delicious Lu Rou Fan and cute goods
